sourceSections: Introduction to Claude's Secret Productivity Codes
Maximizing Reasoning and Token Efficiency: Ultra Think & /caveman

sections.lead: This video introduces seven lesser-known "secret codes" for Claude AI designed to significantly enhance user productivity and efficiency.

bullets.label: Seven Codes
bullets.text: The video introduces seven "secret codes" for Claude AI that significantly enhance user productivity.

bullets.label: 10x Efficiency
bullets.text: The presenter asserts these codes can 10x efficiency, regardless of the user's current proficiency with Claude.

bullets.label: Code Functions
bullets.text: These codes help optimize reasoning, manage tokens, analyze usage, automate tasks, and handle parallel queries.

sections.lead: "Ultra think" maximizes Claude's reasoning for complex tasks, while "/caveman" efficiently reduces output tokens to manage usage.

bullets.label: Ultra Think
bullets.text: The "ultra think" code instructs Claude to apply its maximum reasoning effort for specific complex or technical prompts.

bullets.label: Token Saving
bullets.text: Using "ultra think" for complex tasks allows users to save tokens for more routine work.

bullets.label: /caveman Skill
bullets.text: The /caveman open-source skill significantly reduces the percentage of output tokens used by Claude.

bullets.label: Usage Benefit
bullets.text: This skill is highly beneficial for users on lower-tier plans or those needing to manage strict usage limits.

sections.lead: The /insights code provides a personalized HTML report analyzing your Claude usage over the past 30 days.

bullets.label: Usage Analysis
bullets.text: Typing /insights generates a detailed HTML report analyzing your Claude usage over the past 30 days.

bullets.label: Identify Patterns
bullets.text: The report highlights effective usage patterns and anti-patterns that hinder productivity.

bullets.label: Tailored Suggestions
bullets.text: It offers tailored suggestions for commands, prompts, and features based on your actual tasks.

sections.lead: The /loop and /schedule codes automate recurring tasks, offering distinct execution methods and requirements for users.

bullets.label: /loop Local
bullets.text: The /loop code schedules recurring tasks for up to three days with a minimum interval of one minute, requiring your computer to remain on.

bullets.label: /loop Use
bullets.text: /loop is suitable for recurring reports or automations that need local file access.

bullets.label: /schedule Cloud
bullets.text: The /schedule code runs independently in the cloud, cloning your project/repo, and does not require your computer to be on.

bullets.label: /schedule Limits
bullets.text: /schedule has a minimum interval of one hour, currently no three-day expiry, and daily run limits based on your plan.

sections.lead: The /btw code enables parallel querying, while /clear manages session context for better accuracy and token efficiency.

bullets.label: /btw Parallel
bullets.text: The /btw code allows users to ask Claude a separate question without interrupting its primary, ongoing task.

bullets.label: Context Leverage
bullets.text: This feature is useful for parallelizing work and leveraging existing conversation context without opening a new session.

bullets.label: /clear Purge
bullets.text: The /clear code purges the current session's context, which is crucial for maintaining AI accuracy.

bullets.label: Save Tokens
bullets.text: Purging context helps save tokens by removing irrelevant information before starting new, distinct tasks.

sections.lead: These seven secret codes significantly elevate Claude AI productivity by optimizing various aspects of its use.

bullets.label: Maximize Potential
bullets.text: These codes offer powerful ways to elevate productivity and unlock Claude's full potential.

bullets.label: Key Functions
bullets.text: They cover maximizing reasoning, managing tokens, personalized usage insights, automating tasks, and advanced context handling.

bullets.label: Tailored Workflows
bullets.text: These features allow users to tailor Claude's behavior to complex or specific workflows.
